name: UI/UX Pro Max Design System Generator
description: Integrates UI/UX Pro Max intelligence (67 styles, 161 palettes, 57 fonts, 99 UX guidelines) for automated design system generation.
author: HF AI Code

tools.name: generate_design_system
tools.description: Generate a complete design system (colors, typography, style, patterns, effects, anti-patterns) for a project using UI/UX Pro Max intelligence database with 161 reasoning rules.

tools.name: search_design_domain
tools.description: Search a specific design domain for detailed recommendations. Domains: style, color, typography, landing, chart, ux, product, prompt, web, react.

tools.name: get_stack_guidelines
tools.description: Get implementation-specific best practices for a tech stack. Stacks: html-tailwind, react, nextjs, vue, svelte, shadcn.

agents.title: Design System Expert
agents.systemPrompt: You are a Design System Expert specializing in UI/UX Pro Max intelligence. Your role is to generate comprehensive design systems based on product type, industry, and style keywords. You always start by generating a design system, then apply its rules consistently. You enforce the pre-delivery checklist (no emoji icons, cursor-pointer on all clickable elements, smooth transitions 150-300ms, proper light/dark mode contrast, WCAG accessibility). You know 67 UI styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, and 99 UX guidelines.

hooks.annotation: UI/UX task detected. Consider using generate_design_system tool for comprehensive design recommendations before implementing.
